"NGSC On-site support of C5N equipment installation - Letter MGP-26-30635-01 

Northrop Grumman Systems Corporation (NGSC), is pleased to provide this Time and Material (T&M) proposal to Vigor Works, LLC (Vigor), as requested via References (a), for Northrop Grumman on-site support of C5N equipment installation.
NGSC’s total T&M proposed Ceiling Value is $59,931.48

This proposal is based upon the following Conditions of Quote (CoQ):
1.This T&M effort shall be added as a new/separate CLIN to Reference (b).
2.This T&M proposal is based on the NGSC and Vigor agreed to Terms and Conditions listed under Enclosures (2) and (3).
3. NGSC and Vigor shall agree to Enclosure (1) prior to Purchase Order (PO) award and include it as an Enclosure to the forthcoming PO modification.
(a)Note: The applicable T&M hourly rates are included in Enclosure (1).
(b)The T&M hourly rates shall remain valid for a given calendar year (i.e. from January 1st to December 31st). T&M hourly rates shall be updated every calendar year by NGSC and applied to the PO via modification.
4. PO Period of Performance (PoP), for this effort shall be: 17-March-2026 through 27-September 2026.
5. This quote does not contain any material content; it is for labor and travel cost only.
6. Quoted travel assumes destination is Vancouver, WA.
7. Other Direct Costs (ODC), including travel costs, shall be invoiced at current billing rates and will not be re-rated.
8. Payment terms are Net 45 Days; no discount.
9. This quote shall remain valid until 1600 hours, EST on May 11, 2026."

"LRIP-1 Handrail Fabrication – JR Merit Change Event #002
JR Merit is pleased to provide our proposal for procurement of additional labor and materials to complete the
fabrication work for the LRIP-1 Handrail Project. Our proposal for the subject matter project is as follows
based on Time and Material rates provided by JR Merit for on-site work at Vigor:
Perform additional LRIP-1 handrail fabrication work including additional
supply of materials and fabrication labor for drawing packages not
provided with original scope of work.

Scope of Work:
Provide additional materials for the LRIP-1 handrail fabrication project on a T&M basis. Procurement approval
is based on email from Rachael Casteel to Aaron Olson dated 1/5/2026."

"QMR offers billing rate $103.50 per man hour.
Materials, or fittings required to adapt the piping to QMR flushing equipment, will be charged as they are procured. 
Estimated cost to accomplish this scope 1912 MH @ $103.50. Materials as defined on the quote $38,422.00.

Provide pressure testing with fresh water and flushing services using light oil on the new hydraulic piping system(s) on Lrip 1. Assumes up to eight (8) separate tests and flushes based upon the effort accomplished on MSVL EMD.
Hydrostatic testing using fresh water at pressures up to 10,000 PSI.  Hydraulic oil flushes to be accomplished per specification identified on the quote.
Flushes will continue until independent lab analyses indicate a cleanliness per specification identified on the quote. Flushing oil will be removed from the systems upon acceptance of pipe flushing.
Each system to be flushed until two (2) each, one-hour filter bags are inspected and found to be clean and then taken to the lab for analyses of particulate and water levels. Work will be scheduled by Vigor at the 4400 Vancouver Facility during the requested schedule date. 

This Proposal assumes the following will be provided at no cost to QMR:
440v or 220v with cord and hook up to QMR flushing equipment.
Sufficient fresh water and 110v
Forklift services
Adequate space for QMR job trailer within 50 yards of the work site
Two (2) parking spaces located within 100 yards of the work site.
Periodic progress invoices will be submitted based upon agreed amount of work completed.
Our payment terms are thirty (30) days net."
